name: Erroll Van Maramba
headline: Marketing Designer for eCommerce Brands
subheadline: I help Shopify stores, agencies, and growth teams create campaign-ready design, product visuals, SEO-supportive content, and brand systems that move faster and look sharper.
shortBio: Based in Metro Manila and working remotely with US eCommerce brands, agencies, startups, DTC teams, and Shopify stores.
availability: Open to full-time roles and select freelance collaborations.

heroMetrics.label: Creative support across Outova, Starfire, and Lake Blue workstreams
Product media, uploads, merchandising support, and backend coordination
MoM organic traffic growth supported in Starfire's SEO/SEM program

seo.title: Erroll Van Maramba | Marketing Designer for eCommerce Brands
seo.description: Marketing designer focused on eCommerce creative, Shopify execution, SEO-aware content support, brand systems, and campaign-ready visual production.
